name: Excel Hygiene
description_en: A rigorous "second pair of eyes" on any xlsx before it ships—catches numbers-as-text, hardcoded-over-formula, cell errors, truncated SUMs, and percent-as-whole-number.
description_zh: 在 xlsx 发出前做严格的「第二双眼睛」——揪出数字存为文本、硬编码覆盖公式、单元格错误、被截断的 SUM 与百分比写成整数等问题。
long_en: Runs a deterministic script for mechanical checks, then reasons across the full spreadsheet-error taxonomy (Panko 2008) for subtler issues.
long_zh: 先用确定性脚本做机械校验,再依据完整的电子表格错误分类法(Panko 2008)推理更隐蔽的问题。
sec_note_en: Reads the spreadsheet you provide and reports issues; it does not modify your file without action.
sec_note_zh: 读取你提供的电子表格并报告问题;未经操作不会修改文件。
